global.existTitle: Are you sure to quit the current operation?
global.exitContent: Current configuration not saved. The configured content will not be retrived if you abandon the save. Please exercise caution when performing this operation!

skill.name: Name
skill.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the main functions and usage scenarios in as much detail as possible. The description will be shown to users.
skill.nameInvalid: Only Chinese characters, letters, numbers, and underscores are supported
skill.unsupportedFile: Only .zip files or SKILL.md files are supported
skill.uploadTip: Click or drag to upload a .zip file or SKILL.md file.
skill.previewSelectFile: The preview area is on the right. Select a file to preview.
skill.previewUnsupported: This file type is not supported for online preview
skill.confirmDeleteAction: Are you sure you want to delete this Skill?
skill.confirmUnpublishAction: After unpublishing, agents or workflows referencing this Skill will become invalid. This operation cannot be undone.
